description_long: This is a black peaked cap, commonly associated with uniforms such as those worn by police officers, chauffeurs, or doormen. The hat features a wide, flat, and circular top (crown) with a structured, semi-rigid band encircling the base. At the front, there is a short, slightly curved visor (brim) that extends outward, providing shade and a formal appearance. The cap includes metallic buttons on the sides and a central badge or insignia plate above the brim, adding to its official look. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, slightly glossy material, likely synthetic leather or polished fabric. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with fabric for comfort.
description: A black peaked uniform cap with a flat top, short curved visor, and metallic badge and buttons, made of smooth, glossy material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat top, curved visor, and central badge above the brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic side button and the profile of the visor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous band and absence of decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another metallic button and the curved edge of the visor.
